member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPlugin.PluginGUID
member.summary: MaterialEditor plugin GUID

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPlugin.PluginName
member.summary: MaterialEditor plugin name

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPlugin.PluginVersion
member.summary: MaterialEditor plugin version

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase
member.summary: MaterialEditor plugin base

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.NormalMapProperties
member.summary: Properties that are normal maps and will have their textures converted

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase._convertedNormalMap
member.summary: Dictionary of textures and textures converted to normal maps.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ConvertNormalMap(UnityEngine.Texture@,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Convert a normal map texture from grey to red by setting the entire red color channel to white
member.param: Texture to convert
Name of the property. Checks against the NormalMapProperties list and will not convert unless it matches.
Whether to unpack the compressed normal or not (red normalmap to blue/purple)
member.returns: True if the texture was converted

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ConvertNormalMap(UnityEngine.Texture@,System.String)
member.summary: Convert a normal map texture from grey to red by setting the entire red color channel to white
member.param: Texture to convert
Name of the property. Checks against the NormalMapProperties list and will not convert unless it matches.
member.returns: True if the texture was converted

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.IsBrokenTexture(UnityEngine.Texture)
member.summary:
Determine if the texture has been broken.
An object that is not a texture is set as a texture property. zipmod is broken.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ConvertNormalMap(UnityEngine.Texture,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Convert a normal map texture from grey to red by setting the entire red color channel to white
member.param: Texture to convert
Unpack normal maps if supported
member.returns: Converted Texture

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.Logger
member.summary: Logger instance for the plugin

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance of the plugin

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ExportPathDefault
member.summary: Default path where textures will be exported

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ExportPath
member.summary: Path where textures will be exported

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.LocalTexturePathDefault
member.summary: Default path where local textures will be exported to / imported from

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.LocalTexturePath
member.summary: Path where local textures will be exported to / imported from

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.CopyData
member.summary: Saved material edits

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.LoadedShaders
member.summary: Dictionary of loaded shaders

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.XMLShaderProperties
member.summary: Sorted dictionary of XML shader properties

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.UIScale
member.summary: Configuration entry for ME window scale

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.UIWidth
member.summary: Configuration entry for ME window width

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.UIHeight
member.summary: Configuration entry for ME window height

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.UIListWidth
member.summary: Configuration entry for width of the renderer/materials lists to the side of the window

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.DragSensitivity
member.summary: Configuration entry for sensitivity of dragging labels to edit float values

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.PreventDragout
member.summary: Prevent dragging the ME window outside of the game window

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.WatchTexChanges
member.summary: Configuration entry for watching for file changes and reloading textures on change

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderOptimization
member.summary: Replaces every loaded shader with the MaterialEditor copy of the shader

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ExportBakedMesh
member.summary: Skinned meshes will be exported in their current state with all customization applied as well as in the current pose

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ExportBakedWorldPosition
member.summary: When enabled, objects will be exported with their position changes intact so that, i.e. when exporting two objects they retain their position relative to each other

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ConfigExportPath
member.summary: Textures and models will be exported to this folder. If empty, exports to {ExportPathDefault}

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.PersistFilter
member.summary: Persist search filter across editor windows

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.Showtooltips
member.summary: Whether to show tooltips or not

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.SortPropertiesByType
member.summary: Whether to sort shader properties by their types

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.SortPropertiesByName
member.summary: Whether to sort shader properties by their names

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.SortPropertiesByCategory
member.summary: Whether to sort shader properties by their category

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ProjectorNearClipPlaneMax
member.summary: Controls the max value of the slider for this projector property

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ProjectorFarClipPlaneMax
member.summary: Controls the max value of the slider for this projector property

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ProjectorFieldOfViewMax
member.summary: Controls the max value of the slider for this projector property

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ProjectorAspectRatioMax
member.summary: Controls the max value of the slider for this projector property

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ProjectorOrthographicSizeMax
member.summary: Controls the max value of the slider for this projector property

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ConvertNormalmapsOnExport
member.summary: When enabled, normalmaps get converted from DXT5 compressed (red) normals back to normal OpenGL (blue/purple) normals

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ConfigLocalTexturePath
member.summary: Local textures will be exported to / imported from this folder. If empty, defaults to {LocalTexturePathDefault}

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.DarkMode
member.summary: When enabled, the Material Editor UI uses a dark colour scheme

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.UIFont
member.summary: Font choice for the Material Editor UI

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.MEFont
member.summary: Available font options

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.CollapseRenderersByDefault
member.summary: When enabled, all renderers are collapsed by default when opening a new object

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.CollapseMaterialsByDefault
member.summary: When enabled, all materials are collapsed by default when opening a new object

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShowCollapseRenderersButton
member.summary: When enabled, the Collapse Renderers (R) button is shown in the header

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShowCollapseMaterialsButton
member.summary: When enabled, the Collapse Materials (M) button is shown in the header

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.TooltipOpacity
member.summary: Controls the opacity of the tooltip background (0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque)

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.WindowOpacity
member.summary: Controls the opacity of the Material Editor window background (0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque)

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.TexturePreviewRightClick
member.summary: When enabled, right-clicking a texture property label opens the texture preview panel for that texture

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.Awake
member.summary: Init logic, do not call

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.AssetLoadedHook(XUnity.ResourceRedirector.AssetLoadedContext)
member.summary: Every time an asset is loaded, swap its shader for the one loaded by MaterialEditor. This reduces the number of instances of a shader once they are cleaned up by garbage collection which reduce RAM usage, etc. Also fixes KK mods in EC by swapping them to the equivalent EC shader.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.CheckBlacklist(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Always returns false, i.e. does nothing. Override to prevent certain materials from showing in the UI.
member.param: Name of the material
Name of the property

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.RefreshPropertyOrganization
member.summary: Refreshes the property organization, which groups shader properties by their categories and sorts them based on the configuration settings.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderData
member.summary: Represents data for a shader, including its name, shader object, render queue, and optimization flag.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderData.ShaderName
member.summary: Name of the shader.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderData.Shader
member.summary: Shader object.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderData.RenderQueue
member.summary: Render queue value for the shader. Null if not specified.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderData.ShaderOptimization
member.summary: Indicates whether shader optimization is enabled.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderData.#ctor(UnityEngine.Shader,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The shader object.
The name of the shader.
The render queue value as a string. Defaults to an empty string.
The shader optimization flag as a string. Defaults to null.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData
member.summary: Represents data for a shader property, including its name, type, default values, visibility, range, and category.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.Name
member.summary: Name of the shader property.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.Type
member.summary: Type of the shader property.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.DefaultValue
member.summary: Default value of the shader property.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.DefaultValueAssetBundle
member.summary: Default value of the shader property when loaded from an asset bundle, like a texture.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.AnisoLevel
member.summary: Should only be used with texture properties. The `anisoLevel` of the texture, 0-16.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.FilterMode
member.summary: Should only be used with texture properties. The `filterMode` of the texture.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.WrapMode
member.summary: Should only be used with texture properties. The `wrapMode` of the texture.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.MinValue
member.summary: Should only be used with float properties. Minimum value displayed on the slider, if applicable.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.MaxValue
member.summary: Should only be used with float properties. Maximum value displayed on the slider, if applicable.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.Hidden
member.summary: Indicates whether the shader property is hidden.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.Category
member.summary: Category of the shader property.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorPluginBase.ShaderPropertyData.#ctor(System.String,MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ShaderPropertyType,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Name of the shader property.
Type of the shader property.
Default value of the shader property.
Default value of the shader property when loaded from an asset bundle, like a texture.
Should only be used with texture properties. The `anisoLevel` of the texture, 0-16.
Should only be used with texture properties. The `filterMode` of the texture.
Should only be used with texture properties. The `wrapMode` of the texture.
Should only be used with float properties. Minimum value displayed on the slider, if applicable.
Should only be used with float properties. Maximum value displayed on the slider, if applicable.
Indicates whether the shader property is hidden.
Category of the shader property.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.WeakKeyDictionary`2
member.summary: Class that behaves like a Dictonary[TKey,TValue]. Keys are held by weak reference; if a key is deleted by the GC, the Key-Value of that key is deleted.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.WeakKeyDictionary`2.SweepDeadValuesLittle
member.summary:
Sweeps dead values deleted by the GC from the dictionary.
This is an assumption that is regularly called from Update() and other functions. Clean only to the extent that it does not overload the system.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.WeakKey`1
member.summary: A class that behaves as a dictionary key. Keys are held by weak reference.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.WeakKeyComperer`1.Equals(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Determine whether the objects are the same. Accepts TKey and WeakKey[TKey] as arguments.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI
member.summary: API for safely setting the properties of materials

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorMaterialInstances
member.summary: Projector materials share an instance by default, unlike renderers which get a unique one by default. This list keeps track of every projector and it's new unique material instance

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.MaterialCopyPostfix
member.summary: Postfix added to the name of a material when copied

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.GetRendererList(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Get a list of all the renderers of a GameObject

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.GetProjectorList(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get a list of all the projectors of a GameObject

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.GetMaterials(UnityEngine.GameObject,UnityEngine.Renderer)
member.summary: Get a list of materials for the renderer
member.param: GameObject to which the renderer belongs
Renderer containing the materials
member.returns: Array of materials

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetMaterials(UnityEngine.GameObject,UnityEngine.Renderer,UnityEngine.Material[])
member.summary: Set the material array for a renderer
member.param: GameObject to which the renderer belongs
Renderer containing the materials
Materials to set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.CopyMaterial(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a copy of the materials with the specified name for the GameObject
member.param: GameObject for which to copy materials
Name of the material
Name for the new copy, leave blank to auto generate a name
member.returns: Name of the new copy

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RemoveMaterialCopies(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Remove any material copies added by MaterialEditor for the specified GameObject
member.param: GameObject for which to remove materials

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RemoveMaterial(UnityEngine.GameObject,UnityEngine.Material)
member.summary: Removes a specific material from the specified GameObject's renderers.
member.param: The GameObject whose renderers will be searched for the material.
The material to be removed.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetName(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Rename the material specified by GameObject, Renderer name, and Material name
member.param: GameObject to which the material belongs
Name of the renderer
Name of the material
New name of the material

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetFloat(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Set the value of the specified material property
member.param: GameObject to search for the material. If this GameObject is a ChaControl, only parts comprising the body and face will be searched, not clothes, accessories, etc.
Name of the material being set
Property of the material being set
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the material was found and the value set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetKeyword(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the value of the specified material property
member.param: GameObject to search for the material
Name of the material being set
Property of the material being set
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the material was found and the value set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetColor(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Set the value of the specified material property
member.param: GameObject to search for the material
Name of the material being set
Property of the material being set
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the material was found and the value set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetColor(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.String,UnityEngine.Color)
member.summary: Set the value of the specified material property
member.param: GameObject to search for the material
Name of the material being set
Property of the material being set
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the material was found and the value set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetRendererProperty(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RendererProperties,System.String)
member.summary: Set the value of the specified renderer property
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the renderer being modified
Property of the renderer being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetRendererProperty(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RendererProperties,System.Int32)
member.summary: Set the value of the specified renderer property
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the renderer being modified
Property of the renderer being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetRendererEnabled(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set a renderer enabled or disabled
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the renderer being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetRendererShadowCastingMode(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,UnityEngine.Rendering.ShadowCastingMode)
member.summary: Set the ShadowCastingMode of a renderer
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the renderer being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetRendererReceiveShadows(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the ReceiveShadows property of a renderer
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the renderer being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetRendererUpdateWhenOffscreen(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the ReceiveShadows property of a renderer
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the renderer being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetRendererRecalculateNormals(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Recalculates the normals of a SkinnedMeshRenderer's mesh.
member.param: The GameObject containing the renderer.
The name of the renderer to modify.
If true, recalculates the normals; otherwise, does nothing.
member.returns: True if the normals were recalculated; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetProjectorProperty(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties,System.Single)
member.summary: Set the value of the specified projector property
member.param: GameObject to search for the projector
Name of the projector being modified
Property of the projector being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetProjectorEnabled(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the enabled property of a projector
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the renderer being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetProjectorFarClipPlane(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Set the farclipPlane property of a projector
member.param: GameObject to search for the projector
Name of the projector being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetProjectorNearClipPlane(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Set the nearClipPlane property of a projector
member.param: GameObject to search for the projector
Name of the projector being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetProjectorFieldOfView(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Set the fieldOfView property of a projector
member.param: GameObject to search for the projector
Name of the projector being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetProjectorAspectRatio(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Set the aspectRatio property of a projector
member.param: GameObject to search for the projector
Name of the projector being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetProjectorOrthographic(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the orthographic property of a projector
member.param: GameObject to search for the projector
Name of the projector being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetProjectorOrthographicSize(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Set the orthoGraphicSize property of a projector
member.param: GameObject to search for the projector
Name of the projector being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetProjectorIgnoreLayers(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add or remove the given layer to/from the ignored layers property. Ensures it's not removed/added that was already the case
member.param: GameObject to search for the projector
Name of the projector being modified
If the given layer should be ignored or not
The index of the layer to be added/removed
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetTexture(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.String,UnityEngine.Texture)
member.summary: Set the texture property of a material
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the material being modified
Property of the material being set
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetTextureOffset(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{UnityEngine.Vector2})
member.summary: Set the texture offset property of a material
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the material being modified
Property of the material being set
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetTextureScale(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{UnityEngine.Vector2})
member.summary: Set the texture scale property of a material
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the material being modified
Property of the material being set
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetShader(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the shader of a material. Can only be set to a shader that has been loaded by MaterialEditor.
member.param: The GameObject to search for the renderer.
The name of the material being modified.
The name of the shader to be set.
Indicates whether to preserve the render queue of the material (if it's not specified in shaderData).
member.returns: True if the shader was successfully set; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.SetRenderQueue(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Set the render queue of a material
member.param: GameObject to search for the renderer
Name of the material being modified
Value to be set
member.returns: True if the value was set, false if it could not be set

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ShaderPropertyType
member.summary: Type of the shader property

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ShaderPropertyType.Texture
member.summary: Texture

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ShaderPropertyType.Color
member.summary: Color, Vector4, Vector3, Vector2

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ShaderPropertyType.Float
member.summary: Float, Int, Bool

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ShaderPropertyType.Keyword
member.summary: Bool

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RendererProperties
member.summary: Properties of a renderer that can be set

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RendererProperties.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the renderer is enabled

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RendererProperties.ShadowCastingMode
member.summary: ShadowCastingMode of the renderer

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RendererProperties.ReceiveShadows
member.summary: Whether the renderer will receive shadows cast by other objects

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RendererProperties.RecalculateNormals
member.summary: Whether the renderer should recalculate the normals on itself

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RendererProperties.UpdateWhenOffscreen
member.summary: Whether the renderer updates while off-screen

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties
member.summary: Properties of a projector that can be set

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the projector is enabled

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties.NearClipPlane
member.summary: Near clip plane to start projecting

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties.FarClipPlane
member.summary: Far clip plane to stop projecting

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties.FieldOfView
member.summary: Field of View of projection

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties.AspectRatio
member.summary: Aspect ratio of the projection

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties.Orthographic
member.summary: Whether the projector should project in orthographic mode

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties.OrthographicSize
member.summary: The size of the orthographic projection

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties.IgnoreCharaLayer
member.summary: If the projector should ignore objects on the chara layer

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.ProjectorProperties.IgnoreMapLayer
member.summary: If the projector should ignore objects on the map layer

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes
member.summary:
Class that specifies how a setting should be displayed inside the ConfigurationManager settings window.
Usage: This class template has to be copied inside the plugin's project and referenced by its code directly. make a new instance, assign any fields that you want to override, and pass it as a tag for your setting.
If a field is null (default), it will be ignored and won't change how the setting is displayed. If a field is non-null (you assigned a value to it), it will override default behavior.
member.remarks: You can read more and see examples in the readme at https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx.ConfigurationManager You can optionally remove fields that you won't use from this class, it's the same as leaving them null.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.ShowRangeAsPercent
member.summary: Should the setting be shown as a percentage (only use with value range settings).

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.CustomDrawer
member.summary: Custom setting editor (OnGUI code that replaces the default editor provided by ConfigurationManager). See below for a deeper explanation. Using a custom drawer will cause many of the other fields to do nothing.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Browsable
member.summary: Show this setting in the settings screen at all? If false, don't show.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Category
member.summary: Category the setting is under. Null to be directly under the plugin.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.DefaultValue
member.summary: If set, a "Default" button will be shown next to the setting to allow resetting to default.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.HideDefaultButton
member.summary: Force the "Reset" button to not be displayed, even if a valid DefaultValue is available.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Description
member.summary: Optional description shown when hovering over the setting. Not recommended, provide the description when creating the setting instead.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.DispName
member.summary: Name of the setting.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.Order
member.summary: Order of the setting on the settings list relative to other settings in a category. 0 by default, higher number is higher on the list.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.ReadOnly
member.summary: Only show the value, don't allow editing it.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.IsAdvanced
member.summary: If true, don't show the setting by default. User has to turn on showing advanced settings or search for it.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.ObjToStr
member.summary: Custom converter from setting type to string for the built-in editor textboxes.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.ConfigurationManagerAttributes.StrToObj
member.summary: Custom converter from string to setting type for the built-in editor textboxes.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer
member.summary: Class containing material data, used to for copy and paste of material edits

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.MaterialFloatPropertyList
member.summary: List of float property edits

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.MaterialKeywordPropertyList
member.summary: List of keyword property edits

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.MaterialColorPropertyList
member.summary: List of color property edits

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.MaterialTexturePropertyList
member.summary: List of texture property edits

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.MaterialShaderList
member.summary: List of shader edits

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.ProjectorPropertyList
member.summary: List of projector edits

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.IsEmpty
member.summary: Whether there are any copied edits

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.ClearAll
member.summary: Clear any copied edits

member.summary: Data storage class for float properties

member.summary: ID of the texture as stored in the texture dictionary

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.MaterialTextureProperty.Offset
member.summary: Texture offset value

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.MaterialTextureProperty.Scale
member.summary: Texture scale value

member.summary: Data storage class for texture properties

Byte array containing the texture
Texture offset value
Texture scale value

member.summary: Data storage class for shader data

member.summary: Name of the shader

member.summary: Render queue

member.summary: Data storage class for shader data
member.param: Render queue

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.CopyContainer.MaterialShader.NullCheck
member.summary: Check if the shader name and render queue are both null. Safe to delete this data if true.

member.summary: Data storage class for projector properties

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.Export
member.summary: Contains methods for exporting the renderer data in various formats
Contains methods for exporting the renderer data in various formats

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.Export.ExportObj(UnityEngine.Renderer)
member.summary: Exports the mesh of the SkinnedMeshRenderer or MeshRenderer

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.Export.MeshToObjString(UnityEngine.Renderer)
member.summary: Converts the mesh data from a given Renderer into an OBJ formatted string.
member.param: The Renderer containing the mesh to be converted to an OBJ string. Supported types include MeshRenderer and SkinnedMeshRenderer.
member.returns: A string representation of the mesh in OBJ format, or an empty string if the Renderer does not have a valid mesh.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.Export.ExportUVMaps(UnityEngine.Renderer)
member.summary: Exports the UV map(s) of the SkinnedMeshRenderer or MeshRenderer

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.Export.Reduce(System.Single)
member.summary: Trim any floats outside of 0-1 range so only the decimal place remains. For moving UVs to the main unit square if they are outside of it. Probably a better way to do this. Probably breaks if one or two points of the tri are on a different UV square.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.Extensions.ToColor(System.String)
member.summary: Convert string to Color

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI
member.summary: Code for the MaterialEditor UI

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.MaterialEditorWindow
member.summary: Element containing the entire UI

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.MaterialEditorMainPanel
member.summary: Main panel

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.DragPanel
member.summary: Draggable header

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.UIInstance
member.summary: Singleton instance of the MaterialEditorUI

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.FlatSprite
member.summary: A plain 1x1 white pixel sprite — replaces UILib's rounded sprites for a flat squared look

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.UpdateHeaderButtons
member.summary: Show or hide the R and M header buttons based on config

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.SetTexturePreview(UnityEngine.Texture,System.String)
member.summary: Update the texture preview panel with the given texture and name

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.ApplyTheme
member.summary: Apply light or dark theme to the Material Editor UI

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.ToggleMaterialPreview(System.String,UnityEngine.Texture)
member.summary: Toggle the texture preview for a material row. Right-click same to close, different to switch.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.UpdateTexturePreviewPanelPosition
member.summary: Snap the preview panel to the right of the ME window.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.InitUI
member.summary: Initialize the MaterialEditor UI

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.RefreshUI
member.summary: Refresh the MaterialEditor UI

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.RefreshUI(System.String)
member.summary: Refresh the MaterialEditor UI using the specified filter text

member.name: P:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.Visible
member.summary: Get or set the MaterialEditor UI visibility

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.WildCardSearch(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Search text using wildcards.
member.param: Text to search in
Filter with which to search the text

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.PopulateRendererList(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.Object,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{UnityEngine.Renderer})
member.summary: Populate the renderer list
member.param: GameObject for which to read the renderers
Object that will be passed through to the get/set/reset events
List of all renderers to display

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.PopulateMaterialList(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.Object,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{UnityEngine.Renderer})
member.summary: Populate the materials list
member.param: GameObject for which to read the renderers
Object that will be passed through to the get/set/reset events
List of all materials to display

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.PopulateRenameList(UnityEngine.GameObject,UnityEngine.Material,System.Object)
member.summary: Populate the rename list
member.param: GameObject for which to read the renderers
Material to be renamed
Object that will be passed through to the get/set/reset events

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.PopulateList(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Populate the MaterialEditor UI
member.param: GameObject for which to read the renderers and materials
Object that will be passed through to the get/set/reset events
Comma separated list of text to filter the results

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.OnGUI
member.summary: Obj export should be done in OnGUI or something similarly late so that finger rotation is exported properly

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.PopulateListCoroutine(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Hacky workaround to wait for the dropdown fade to complete before refreshing

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.GetRendererPropertyValueOriginal(System.Object,UnityEngine.Renderer,MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RendererProperties,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Gets the original value of a renderer property.
member.param: The data object associated with the renderer.
The renderer to retrieve the property value from.
The property to retrieve.
The game object associated with the renderer.
member.returns: The original value of the renderer property.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.GetRendererPropertyValue(System.Object,UnityEngine.Renderer,MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialAPI.RendererProperties,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Gets the current value of a renderer property.
member.param: The data object associated with the renderer.
The renderer to retrieve the property value from.
The property to retrieve.
The game object associated with the renderer.
member.returns: The current value of the renderer property.

member.summary: Sets the value of a renderer property.
member.param: The data object associated with the renderer.
The renderer to modify.
The property to set.
The value to set for the property.
The game object associated with the renderer.

member.summary: Removes a renderer property.

The property to remove.
The game object associated with the renderer.

member.returns: The original value of the projector property.

member.returns: The current value of the projector property.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.GetProjectorList(System.Object,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Gets the list of projectors associated with a game object.
member.param: The data object associated with the game object.
The game object to retrieve projectors from.
member.returns: An enumerable list of projectors.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.MaterialCopyEdits(System.Object,UnityEngine.Material,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Copies edits made to a material.
member.param: The data object associated with the material.
The material to copy edits from.
The game object associated with the material.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.MaterialPasteEdits(System.Object,UnityEngine.Material,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Pastes edits to a material.
member.param: The data object associated with the material.
The material to paste edits to.
The game object associated with the material.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.MaterialCopyRemove(System.Object,UnityEngine.Material,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Removes copied edits from a material.
member.param: The data object associated with the material.
The material to remove copied edits from.
The game object associated with the material.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.GetMaterialNameOriginal(System.Object,UnityEngine.Renderer,UnityEngine.Material,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Gets the original name of a material.
member.param: The data object associated with the material.
The renderer associated with the material.
The material to retrieve the name from.
The game object associated with the material.
member.returns: The original name of the material.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.SetMaterialName(System.Object,UnityEngine.Renderer,UnityEngine.Material,System.String,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Sets the name of a material.
member.param: The data object associated with the material.
The renderer associated with the material.
The material to set the name for.
The new name for the material.
The game object associated with the material.

The game object associated with the material.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.MaterialEditorUI.GetMaterialShaderNameOriginal(System.Object,UnityEngine.Material,UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Gets the original shader name of a material.
member.param: The data object associated with the material.
The material to retrieve the shader name from.
The game object associated with the material.
member.returns: The original shader name of the material.

member.summary: Sets the shader name of a material.

The material to set the shader name for.
The new shader name for the material.
The game object associated with the material.

member.summary: Removes the shader name of a material.

The game object associated with the material.

member.summary: Gets the original render queue value of a material's shader.

The material to retrieve the render queue value from.
The game object associated with the material.
member.returns: The original render queue value of the material's shader.

member.summary: Sets the render queue value of a material's shader.

The material to set the render queue value for.

The game object associated with the material.

The game object associated with the material.

member.param: The data object associated with the material.
The material to retrieve the texture value from.
The name of the texture property.
The game object associated with the material.
member.returns: True if the texture value has changed; otherwise, false.

The game object associated with the material.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.AutoScrollToSelectionWithDropdown
member.summary: Set the initial scroll position of the dropdown to the position of the selected item.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.FloatLabelDragTrigger
member.summary: Allows dragging to adjust the value of an InputField.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.FloatLabelDragTrigger.InputField
member.summary: The InputField that will be adjusted when dragging.

member.name: F:MaterialEditorAPI.FloatLabelDragTrigger.PairedInputFields
member.summary: Optional paired InputFields that will also be adjusted when dragging.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.FloatLabelDragTrigger.Initialize(UnityEngine.UI.InputField,UnityEngine.UI.InputField[])
member.summary: Initializes the FloatLabelDragTrigger with the specified InputField and optional paired InputFields.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.DropdownFilter.AddFilterUI(UnityEngine.UI.Dropdown,System.String)
member.summary: Add filter UI to dropdown
member.param: Target dropdown
Name for persistent filter. A persisted filter will continue to hold the filter after it is closed.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.DropdownFilter.SetUIPosition
member.summary: Set the position of the filter UI. The drop-down UI is displayed either up or down depending on position. Change the position of the filter UI accordingly.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.ResizeHandle
member.summary: Attach to a small corner element to allow resizing of a parent RectTransform by dragging.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.RightClickHandler
member.summary: Handles left-click and right-click on a UI element without using a Button component, which avoids layout recalculation side-effects on Text elements.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.StickySectionBar
member.summary: Sticky section bars that sit just below the ME title bar. Uses scroll-position math (not world-space) to decide which bar is visible. Each bar mirrors the real section header and includes a working collapse button.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.StickySectionBar.UpdateLayout(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates section indices and label text. Call from PopulateList after rebuilding the item list.

member.name: T:MaterialEditorAPI.SliderClickExpander
member.summary: Expands the clickable area of a Slider to fill its parent panel row. Unity's HorizontalLayoutGroup prevents anchor-based solutions, so we parent a transparent Image to the row panel and forward pointer events.

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.Utilities.OpenFileInExplorer(System.String)
member.summary: Open explorer focused on the specified file or directory

member.name: M:MaterialEditorAPI.Utilities.NativeMethods.OpenFolderAndSelectFile(System.String)
member.summary: Open explorer focused on item. Reuses already opened explorer windows unlike Process.Start

member.name: T:KKAPI.Utilities.OpenFileDialog
member.summary: Gives access to the Windows open file dialog. http://www.pinvoke.net/default.aspx/comdlg32/GetOpenFileName.html http://www.pinvoke.net/default.aspx/Structures/OpenFileName.html http://www.pinvoke.net/default.aspx/Enums/OpenSaveFileDialgueFlags.html https://social.msdn.microsoft.com/Forums/en-US/2f4dd95e-5c7b-4f48-adfc-44956b350f38/getopenfilename-for-multiple-files?forum=csharpgeneral

member.name: F:KKAPI.Utilities.OpenFileDialog.SingleFileFlags
member.summary: Arguments used for opening a single file

member.name: F:KKAPI.Utilities.OpenFileDialog.MultiFileFlags
member.summary: Arguments used for opening multiple files

member.name: M:KKAPI.Utilities.OpenFileDialog.ShowDialog(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,KKAPI.Utilities.OpenFileDialog.OpenSaveFileDialgueFlags,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Show windows file open dialog. Blocks the thread until user closes the dialog. Returns list of selected files, or null if user cancelled the action.
member.param: A string to be placed in the title bar of the dialog box. If this member is NULL, the system uses the default title (that is, Save As or Open)
The initial directory. The algorithm for selecting the initial directory varies on different platforms.
A list of filter pairs separated by |. First item is the display name, while the second is the actual filter (e.g. *.txt) Example: "Log files (.log)|*.log|All files|*.*"
The default extension. This extension is appended to the file name if the user fails to type an extension.
A set of bit flags you can use to initialize the dialog box. When the dialog box returns, it sets these flags to indicate the user's input. This member can be a combination of the CommomDialgueFlags.
Hwnd pointer of the owner window. IntPtr.Zero to use default parent

member.name: M:KKAPI.Utilities.OpenFileDialog.Show(System.Action{System.String[]},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,KKAPI.Utilities.OpenFileDialog.OpenSaveFileDialgueFlags)
member.summary: Show windows file open dialog. Doesn't pause the game.
member.param: Action that gets called with results of user's selection. Returns list of selected files, or null if user cancelled the action. WARNING: This runs on another thread! Game will crash if you attempt to access unity methods. You can use KoikatuAPI.SynchronizedInvoke to go back to the main thread.
A string to be placed in the title bar of the dialog box. If this member is NULL, the system uses the default title (that is, Save As or Open)
The initial directory. The algorithm for selecting the initial directory varies on different platforms.
A list of filter pairs separated by |. First item is the display name, while the second is the actual filter (e.g. *.txt) Example: "Log files (.log)|*.log|All files|*.*"
The default extension. This extension is appended to the file name if the user fails to type an extension.
A set of bit flags you can use to initialize the dialog box. When the dialog box returns, it sets these flags to indicate the user's input. This member can be a combination of the CommomDialgueFlags.

member.name: F:KKAPI.Utilities.OpenFileDialog.OpenSaveFileDialgueFlags.OFN_NOLONGNAMES
member.summary: Force no long names for 4.x modules

member.name: F:KKAPI.Utilities.OpenFileDialog.OpenSaveFileDialgueFlags.OFN_EXPLORER
member.summary: New look commdlg

member.name: F:KKAPI.Utilities.OpenFileDialog.OpenSaveFileDialgueFlags.OFN_LONGNAMES
member.summary: Force long names for 3.x modules

member.name: M:UILib.Extensions.OptionIndex(UnityEngine.UI.Dropdown,System.String)
member.summary: Return the index of the option matching the specified text or -1 if not found

member.name: M:UILib.Extensions.OptionText(UnityEngine.UI.Dropdown,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the text of the item at the specified index or null if option doesn't exist

member.name: M:UILib.Extensions.Set(UnityEngine.UI.Toggle,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the value of a Toggle
member.param: Whether to trigger events

member.name: M:UILib.Extensions.Set(UnityEngine.UI.Slider,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the value of a Slider
member.param: Whether to trigger events

member.name: M:UILib.Extensions.Set(UnityEngine.UI.Scrollbar,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the value of a Scrollbar
member.param: Whether to trigger events

member.name: M:UILib.Extensions.Set(UnityEngine.UI.Dropdown,System.Int32)
member.summary: Set the value of a Dropdown

member.name: M:UILib.Extensions.Set(UnityEngine.UI.InputField,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the value of an InputField
member.param: Whether to trigger events
